reason: Response A shows the hallmarks of the more capable Opus tier: a sharper conceptual frame (beauty that is "captured rather than experienced," "instantly legible"), richer and more varied imagery, and notably a self-aware caveat guarding against its own snobbery, which reflects deeper reflective reasoning. Response B is competent but more formulaic and conventional, leaning on the familiar symmetry/golden-ratio talking points without the meta-level self-correction, which reads as the smaller Haiku model.
